name: repo-level-up-plugin
description: Adds a /repo-level-up skill that takes a freshly bootstrapped repo to release-ready maturity: release/uat + release/prod branches, promotion workflows, GitGuardian secret scanning, Claude on-demand, Dependabot (github-actions), vibe-guard SARIF, version-aware PR template, branch protection rulesets, and a 'Checklist for Human Admin' GitHub issue covering the manual setup steps (secrets, hosting, etc.).
